news.title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
news.summary: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year. Apple remains the world's most valuable company, with a market value of more than $1 trillion.

news.title: Trump lashes out at UK and France, telling allies 'the U.S.A. won't be there to help you anymore'
news.summary: The U.S. and Israel are conducting a military operation against Iran. President Trump has criticized European allies for refusing to take part in the operation.

news.title: McCormick buys Unilever's food business in deal that values it at nearly $45 billion
news.summary: McCormick to pay combination of cash and equity to expand further into condiments and spreads. McCormick will pay a combination ofcash and equity.

news.title: Epstein files: Buffett says he hasn't talked to Bill Gates 'since the whole thing was unveiled'
news.summary: Microsoft founder Bill Gates is one of many high-profile people who have suffered reputational fallout from their relationship with Jeffrey Epstein. Bill Gates has been accused of having an affair with Epstein.

news.title: Marvell stock pops 8% as Nvidia takes $2 billion stake, continuing run of similar bets
news.summary: . Nvidia has also made $2 billion investments in CoreWeave, Nebius and Coherent in recent months. Nvidia also has a $1.5 billion investment in cloud-computing company Cogent.

news.title: McCormick’s stock having worst month in 46 years, as investor frown on Unilever Foods deal
news.summary: McCormick's stock was headed for its worst month since September 1980. McCormick announced terms of a $44.8 billion deal to combine with Unilever’s foods business.

news.title: More college students will need to turn to private loans to pay for school — but 40% of Americans won’t qualify, according to a new report
news.summary: Federal government set to pull back significantly from lending to students. Private student lenders are gearing up to fill the void. A new report indicates a large share of students could be left behind.

news.title: $4 gas is here — but one group of drivers could cruise through this ‘psychological wall’
news.summary: “The economy feels a bit miserable right now,” one financial-wellness expert says. “I’m shifting from autopilot to a more intentional strategy.”

news.title: Amazon’s satellite business gets another win as it seeks to challenge Musk’s Starlink
news.summary: Delta Air Lines says it will equip hundreds of aircraft with Amazon’s nascent satellite-internet system. Delta Air Lines said it would equip Hundreds of Aircraft with Amazon's nascent satellite internet system.

news.title: Here’s what’s worth streaming in April 2026 on Netflix, Hulu, HBO Max and more
news.summary: HBO Max has new seasons of ‘Hacks’ and ‘Euphoria’ Hulu revives ‘Malcolm in the Middle’
